message:
test: add 17 proptest property tests for swarm_work_queue

Extended coverage for dependency-aware work queue:
- Agent capacity enforcement and multi-agent independence
- Completion cascading (linear chains and fan-in unblocking)
- Failure/retry lifecycle with max_retries boundary
- Cancel behavior for ready and missing items
- QueueStats sum invariants and total_items consistency
- WorkItemStatus::is_terminal correctness
- Serde roundtrips for WorkItem, WorkQueueConfig, WorkItemStatus
- Sequence monotonicity across mutations
- Completion log append-only and record accuracy
- ready_items() status consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
